# API Checklist: Provide Health Checks and Service Metrics

**Purpose**: Validate health and metrics endpoint responses.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/031-health-service-metrics/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Health Endpoint

- [x] CHK-API-001 Health response includes overall status and dependency statuses.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Stale open-data ingestion is reported as Degraded.

## Metrics Endpoint

- [x] CHK-API-003 Metrics response includes request/error counts and latency.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Metrics include cache hit ratio and routing fallback usage.
